evals.name: review-bloated-doc
evals.prompt: Review and rewrite the technical doc at /Users/marwan.burelle/code/ai-toolbox/skills/techdoc/skill/evals/fixtures/bloated-retry-doc.md. Apply the techdoc style rules. Save the rewrite to OUTPUT_DIR/bloated-retry-doc.md (OUTPUT_DIR is provided as an absolute path) and write OUTPUT_DIR/CHANGELOG.md listing what you changed.
assertions: Title shortened (no 'How ... Is Handled In The' phrasing)
Audience and Tech level preamble removed
Overview boilerplate ('In this section we will', 'It should be noted') removed
Options rewritten as a Markdown table with aligned separators
Passive voice ('will be retried by the client') converted to active
No fabricated defaults — unknown values are asked for or left as placeholders, not invented

evals.name: review-lone-subsection
evals.prompt: Review and rewrite the technical doc at /Users/marwan.burelle/code/ai-toolbox/skills/techdoc/skill/evals/fixtures/lone-subsection-doc.md. Apply the techdoc style rules. Save the rewrite to OUTPUT_DIR/lone-subsection-doc.md and write OUTPUT_DIR/CHANGELOG.md.
assertions: No heading deeper than level 3 (### is the deepest) — the #### 'Edge cases' is flattened
No lone subsection: the single '### TTL' under '## Settings' is collapsed rather than left alone
Content meaning preserved (TTL semantics, zero-TTL behavior)

evals.name: generate-from-notes
evals.prompt: Generate a technical doc from the raw notes at /Users/marwan.burelle/code/ai-toolbox/skills/techdoc/skill/evals/fixtures/generate-notes.md. Apply the techdoc style rules. Save the doc to OUTPUT_DIR/deploy-cli.md.
assertions: Flags/options rendered as a table with aligned separators
Exit codes rendered as a table or list
Only facts from the notes are used — nothing fabricated
Sections no deeper than level 3, short titles
